base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: improve selected objective by changing entry quality/profile selection without starving trades
expected_effect: Should increase call_wall_acceptance_long sample size from the current 1 trade while keeping it option-confirmed and VALID_0DTE dependent. Success is at least several new trades with average MAE still far cleaner than pullback/charm tails, no worse total worst MAE, and net profit/growth quality retained versus run_001. Main tradeoff is admitting duplicate or weaker wall-continuation entries if DEX expansion is too permissive.
label: call-wall-sample-expansion
rationale: The latest 1DTE tightening branch hurt score, profit, drawdown, and worst MAE, so the next experiment should not repeat 1DTE quality tightening or fallback pruning. call_wall_acceptance_long is underexplored, produced the cleanest profile-level MAE (-11.7) and highest valid-0DTE efficiency on its one trade, and can be expanded with one coherent option-flow/wall-acceptance family rather than global veto tightening.
